landing.heroSubtitle: Control your PC from anywhere. Claude leads, Gemini, Codex & Aider execute — your personal AI team from any browser.
landing.featureOrchDesc: Claude acts as conductor. Gemini for analysis, Codex for code generation, Aider for file editing — register any CLI as a custom worker.
landing.featureControlDesc: Send commands from your phone, tablet, or any browser. Your PC runs the AI in the background.
landing.featureE2EDesc: All communications are highly secured and E2E encrypted using AES-256-GCM architecture.
landing.mockupLine3: Listening securely for Web CLI connections...
landing.footer: Pocket AI - Your Portable CLI Agent.
landing.featureHistoryDesc: Conversation history is stored only on your PC. On reconnect, the CLI automatically sends your history — nothing stays on the server.
landing.featurePermissionDesc: When Claude asks to modify files or run commands, approve or deny right from your phone.

login.title: Pocket AI
login.subtitle: Control your PC's AI agent from anywhere
login.step1: Navigate to your project folder in the desktop terminal.
login.step3_suffix: to start the daemon, and your PC will appear here.
login.e2eNotice: All communications are end-to-end encrypted with AES-256-GCM

dashboard.noSessionsHint: Run {command} in your PC terminal to connect.
dashboard.engineOnlineOnly: Only engines currently online can be selected.
dashboard.engineNotOnline: This engine is not currently online.
dashboard.customEngineHint: Start with pocket-ai start --cmd "command" on your PC.
dashboard.customEngineRequired: Please enter a custom engine name.
dashboard.noOnlineLauncher: An online PC session is required first.
dashboard.createLaunchPending: Session created, but launch request was not delivered to your PC.
dashboard.recentPathsEmpty: No recent paths for this filter
dashboard.newSessionHint1: You can also start a session directly from your PC terminal:
dashboard.selectSessionHint: Choose a session from the list on the left
dashboard.deleteSessionConfirm: Delete this session? Chat history will also be removed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.cliTokenDescription: Use this token when running pocket-ai login in your PC terminal.
settings.logoutDescription: Log out from this device. Your sessions will remain safely encrypted.

chat.sessionReadyHint1: Send a message to the AI.
chat.sessionReadyHint2: Responses will appear in real time.
chat.keyExchange: AES-256-GCM end-to-end encryption key exchange in progress
chat.connectionLostHint: Please check your network. The secure session will be re-established automatically when connection is restored.

chatSettings.title: Session Settings
chatSettings.permDefaultDesc: Ask for permission on each tool use
chatSettings.permAcceptEditsDesc: Auto-allow file edit and create operations
chatSettings.permYoloDesc: Auto-allow all tool uses (use with caution)
chatSettings.modelNote: Applied immediately to the running session via /model command
chatSettings.builtinGeminiDesc: Google Gemini CLI — broad knowledge, reasoning, long-context, UI design
chatSettings.builtinCodexDesc: OpenAI Codex CLI — complex refactors, migrations, GPT-based code generation
chatSettings.builtinAiderDesc: Aider CLI — git-native code editing, 100+ models, multi-file refactoring
chatSettings.workerDescPlaceholder: Describe when Claude should delegate to this worker
chatSettings.workerHint: More specific descriptions help Claude delegate more accurately
